zh.Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain: 西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara於1082年出生在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯哈薩三 米格爾 阿卡爾時，他的父親Gonzalo Nuñez32歲，母親Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla42歲。他和Reina Urraca de León至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他於1107年被列為alferez del rey alfonso vi。他去世於1130年10月16日在法國巴希-列內斯巴約訥享年48歲，埋葬在西班牙卡斯利亞 Y 利安布爾戈斯布爾戈斯。

nameMeanings.name: Gonçalvez
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Manuel, Carlos, Fernando, Luis, Domingos, Jorge, Ana, Jaime, Francisco, Alfredo, Armando.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim, Paulo, Sebastiao, Albano, Catarina, Duarte, Henrique, Marcio, Martinho, Serafim, Terezinha.
Portuguese (Gonçálves): patronymic from the personal name Gonçalo (see Gonzalo ). Compare Gonsalves .

variants.name: Gonzalo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Miguel, Pedro, Albino, Amador, Angelina, Arana, Arnaldo, Blanco, Carlos, Casimiro, Castro, Diego.
Spanish: from the personal name Gonzalo, of Visigothic origin, formed with the element gunth ‘battle’.

variants.name: Gonsalves
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Manuel, Jose, Fernando, Americo, Joaquin, Jorge, Luis, Miguel, Bernardo, Jose Carlos, Juvenal, Pedro.  Portuguese Joao, Joaquim.
Portuguese: variant of Gonçalves (see Goncalves ). This surname is also found in western India, where it was taken by Portuguese colonists.

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lara
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jose, Juan, Manuel, Francisco, Carlos, Jorge, Luis, Pedro, Jesus, Roberto, Rafael, Mario.
Spanish: habitational name from a place called Lara de los Infantes in Burgos province. Compare   De Lara  .

variants.name: De Lara
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Carlos, Juan, Jose, Luis, Mauricio, Pedro, Alfonso, Ana, Jaime, Javier, Jorge, Merlinda.
Spanish: variant, with the preposition de ‘from’, of Lara .

nameMeanings.name: Pedro
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara was born in 1082, in San Miguel Arcángel, Haza, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain, his father, Gonzalo Nuñez, was 32 and his mother, Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla, was 42. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Reina Urraca de León. In 1107, his occupation is listed as alferez del rey alfonso vi. He died on 16 October 1130, in Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 48, and was buried in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara est né en 1082, à San Miguel Arcángel, Haza, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne, son père, Gonzalo Nuñez, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla, avait 42 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Reina Urraca de León. En 1107, sa profession de son indiquée est alferez del rey alfonso vi. Il est décédé le 16 octobre 1130, à Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 48 ans, et a été enterré à Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara 1082 in San Miguel Arcángel, Haza, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gonzalo Nuñez 32 und seine Mutter Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla 42. Er hatte mit Reina Urraca de León mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. 1107 ist sein Beruf als alferez del rey alfonso vi aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. Oktober 1130 im Alter von 48 Jahren in Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, Frankreich und wurde in Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spanien begraben.

it.Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spain: Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna
it.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara è nato il nel 1082 nel San Miguel Arcángel, Haza, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna, il suo padre, Gonzalo Nuñez, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla, aveva 42 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Reina Urraca de León. Nel 1107, la sua occupazione è indicata come alferez del rey alfonso vi. Morì il 16 ottobre 1130, nel Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 48 anni, e fu sepolto a Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Spagna.

ja.lifeSummary: Pedro Gonçalvez de Laraが1082年にスペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスハザサン ミグエル アルクaンジェルで生まれた時，父Gonzalo Nuñezは32歳，母Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castillaは42歳であった。彼はReina Urraca de Leónとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。1107年，職業はalferez del rey alfonso viと記録されている。彼は1130年10月16日にフランスバセス-プイルeンeスバイオンで48歳で死去し，スペインカスティラ イ レoンブルゴスブルゴスにて埋葬された。

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara nasceu em 1082, em San Miguel Arcángel, Haza, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha, seu pai, Gonzalo Nuñez, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla, tinha 42 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Reina Urraca de León. Em 1107, sua profissão aparece como alferez del rey alfonso vi. Ele faleceu em 16 de outubro de 1130, em Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, França, com 48 anos, e foi sepultado em Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, Espanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara родился в 1082 г. в местности сан мигуел аркaнгел, хаза, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания, его отцу по имени Gonzalo Nuñez было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla, 42. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Reina Urraca de León. В 1107 году он работал по профессии alferez del rey alfonso vi. Он умер 16 октября 1130 г. в местности беенн, бассес-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 48 лет и был похоронен в местности бургос, бургос, кастилла и леoн, Испания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Pedro Gonçalvez de Lara nació en 1082, en San Miguel Arcángel, Haza, Burgos, Castilla y León, España, su papá, Gonzalo Nuñez, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Goda Salvadores de Navarra y Castilla, tenía 42 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Reina Urraca de León. En 1107, su ocupación registrada era alferez del rey alfonso vi. Murió el 16 de octubre de 1130, en Bayonne, Basses-Pyrénées, Francia, a la edad de 48 años, y fue sepultado en Burgos, Burgos, Castilla y León, España.
